prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约1390→1225→1288→1152→1132，整体呈前移趋势，近3年累计前移约156名；2025年基准约1132名，为近年最高水平；该校在安徽省物理类计划2021年50人、2022年50人、2023年45人、2024年45人、2025年37人；2026年计划大幅增至67人，较2025年扩招约81%，显著缓解竞争压力，是影响位次的核心因素。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第12名（哈工大本部），属全国顶尖工科院校，深圳校区依托本部资源且地处大湾区，吸引力强劲；2026年声誉评价中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度持续较高；2024年曾出现投档线异常信号但属个别省份，对安徽影响有限；哈工大本部拥有力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A等大量A类学科，深圳校区共享学科资源，计算机、电子信息、自动化等专业实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与该校优势专业高度重合，吸引高分考生报考；安徽省2026年总考生约45.1万，较2025年（约46.2万）略有减少，物理类考生估算约31.3万（较2025年32.1万小幅下降），竞争略有缓解；省控线物理类本科批2025年461分，较2024年465分略降，卷面难度或略有上升；该校位于深圳，属一线城市，地域吸引力强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划大幅扩招（37→67人）是最大影响因素，将显著拉低位次（位次数字增大）；但学校层次极高（C9/985）、计算机等热门专业持续高热、抖音关注度高、考生总数略有下降等因素部分抵消扩招效应。预测最低位次约1633名，区间1437–1829名。

一档（最难进）

- 工科试验班（自主智能）（含人工智能、机器人工程、自动化）。

- 数学与应用数学（卓越联培班）。

- 工科试验班（未来城市卓越联培班）（含土木工程、环境工程、化学、建筑学、城乡规划）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类大幅扩招，位次预计后移至约1633名，建议位次在1400–1800名区间考生以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次在1400名以内可重点冲刺一档计算机与电子通信/自主智能类王牌专业；位次在1800名以后仍有机会进入三档工科试验班。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 1390 → 1225 → 1288 → 1152 → 1132, showing an overall forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 156 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1132, the highest level in recent years; the university's enrollment plan in Anhui for Physics Category was 50 in 2021, 50 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 45 in 2024, and 37 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 67, an expansion of about 81% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure, which is the core factor affecting rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking 2026 about 12th (HIT main campus), belongs to the top engineering universities nationwide; the Shenzhen campus relies on main campus resources and is located in the Greater Bay Area, with strong appeal; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, no major negative public opinion; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 10th (high heat), large short video exposure, reflecting sustained high attention for applications; in 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission line but it was in individual provinces, with limited impact on Anhui; HIT main campus has a large number of A-class disciplines such as Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, etc.; the Shenzhen campus shares disciplinary resources, with outstanding strengths in Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly overlapping with the university's advantageous majors, attracting high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates in Anhui in 2026 is about 451,000, slightly decreasing from about 462,000 in 2025; Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 313,000 (slightly down from 321,000 in 2025), competition slightly easing; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 461 points, slightly lower than 465 points in 2024, indicating a slight increase in exam difficulty; the university is located in Shenzhen, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Overall, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (37→67) is the biggest influencing factor, which will significantly lower the ranking (increase the ranking number); however, factors such as the university's extremely high level (C9/985), sustained high popularity of majors like Computer Science, high Douyin attention, and a slight decrease in total candidates partially offset the expansion effect. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1633, with a range of 1437–1829.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Electronic Communication)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) (including Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (including Computer Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Excellent Joint Training Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Energy Excellent Joint Training Class) (including Materials Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Engineering Mechanics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future City Excellent Joint Training Class) (including Civil Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Chemistry, Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category sees a significant expansion, with rankings expected to shift back to about 1633. It is recommended that candidates with rankings in the 1400–1800 range focus on Tier 2 as the main target, sprint for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as a safety; candidates with rankings within 1400 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1's top majors like Computer and Electronic Communication/Autonomous Intelligence; candidates with rankings after 1800 still have a chance to enter Tier 3 Engineering Experimental Classes.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1094 → 873 → 763, showing a significant forward shift for three consecutive years, with a cumulative forward shift of about 331 places, indicating intensifying competition; the 2025 baseline is about 763 places; the university's enrollment plan in Anhui Province for liberal arts/history category was 4 students in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 4 in 2025; there is no enrollment plan data for the history category in 2026, according to.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking 2026 approximately 12th (HIT main campus), belonging to the top national universities, with strong brand effect of Shenzhen campus; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 10th (high heat), overall attention high; history category has few majors but the overall reputation of the school is also attractive to liberal arts students; HIT main campus's advantageous disciplines are mainly engineering, while liberal arts enrollment majors (Economics and Management Experimental Class, Architecture) correspond to Management Science and Engineering A, Business Administration A, Architecture A-, Urban and Rural Planning A, with considerable discipline strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of economics and management categories is divided and wait-and-see, architecture category is divided and wait-and-see, overall popularity is moderate; total number of examinees in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 451,000, history category examinees estimated at about 138,000 (slightly decreased from 141,000 in 2025), competition slightly eased; provincial control line for history category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 477 points, up from 462 points in 2024, indicating a slight decrease in exam difficulty; the university is located in Shenzhen, a first-tier city that also has strong appeal to liberal arts students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of forward shift in history category rankings for three consecutive years, stable enrollment plan, and good school reputation, it is expected that the ranking in 2026 will continue to shift slightly forward; however, factors such as a slight decrease in total examinees and an increase in the provincial control line provide some buffer. Predicted minimum ranking is about 733, with a range of 633–833.
